## QA Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New functionality has tests
- [ ] No credentials, PII, or infrastructure details in committed files
- [ ] Prompt changes tested manually (if applicable)
- [ ] `settings.example.json` updated (if new config keys added)
- [ ] Imports compile (`python -c "import claude_works.main"`)
